name: email-classify
description: Classify an email — simulates email checker agent (haiku)
prompt:
Classify this email into exactly one category: support, billing, feature-request, spam, onboarding, or other.

From: john@example.com
Subject: Can't access my dashboard
Body: Hi, I just signed up yesterday and my subscription is active but when I try to log in to the dashboard I get a 403 error. I've tried clearing my cache and using incognito mode. Can someone help?

Respond with ONLY the category name, nothing else.
